summary.en: IEC 62619:2022 and the IEC 62933 series are internationally used references for industrial lithium battery safety and electrical energy storage systems. In Chile, they should be treated as standards that may be required by project specifications, lenders, EPC contracts, insurers, SEC technical review, or grid studies unless a specific Chilean instrument incorporates them for the product or installation.
summary.zh: IEC 62619:2022和IEC 62933系列是工业锂电池安全及电能存储系统常用的国际参考标准。在智利，除非特定智利法规或技术文件将其纳入某一产品或安装要求，否则应将其视为可能由项目技术规格、融资方、EPC合同、保险方、SEC技术审查或电网研究要求的标准。
summary.zht: IEC 62619:2022和IEC 62933系列是工業鋰電池安全及電能儲存系統常用的國際參考標準。在智利，除非特定智利法規或技術文件將其納入某一產品或安裝要求，否則應將其視為可能由項目技術規格、融資方、EPC合約、保險方、SEC技術審查或電網研究要求的標準。

summary.en: China BESS packages often cite GB 44240-2024 and GB/T 36276-2023 for lithium batteries used in electrical energy storage. These are not one-for-one substitutes for IEC 62619:2022 or IEC 62933 evidence when a Chilean project contract or reviewer asks for IEC test clauses, system definitions, safety case documentation, or grid-storage performance evidence.
summary.zh: 中国BESS资料通常引用GB 44240-2024和GB/T 36276-2023作为电力储能锂电池依据。当智利项目合同或审查方要求IEC试验条款、系统定义、安全论证文件或电网储能性能证据时，这些中国标准并非IEC 62619:2022或IEC 62933证据的一一替代。
summary.zht: 中國BESS資料通常引用GB 44240-2024和GB/T 36276-2023作為電力儲能鋰電池依據。當智利項目合約或審查方要求IEC試驗條款、系統定義、安全論證文件或電網儲能性能證據時，這些中國標準並非IEC 62619:2022或IEC 62933證據的一一替代。

gap.en: Map Chinese cell, module, rack, PCS, BMS, EMS, enclosure, HVAC, and fire-mitigation evidence to the exact IEC clauses requested by the Chile project. Where editions are not stated in the Chilean instrument or contract, cite bare standard numbers and confirm the edition with the buyer, certifier, or engineer of record.
gap.zh: 应将中国电芯、模组、电池架、PCS、BMS、EMS、箱体、暖通和消防缓解证据映射至智利项目要求的具体IEC条款。如智利法规文件或合同未说明版本，应引用裸标准号，并与买方、认证机构或责任工程师确认版本。
gap.zht: 應將中國電芯、模組、電池架、PCS、BMS、EMS、箱體、暖通和消防緩解證據映射至智利項目要求的具體IEC條款。如智利法規文件或合約未說明版本，應引用裸標準號，並與買方、認證機構或責任工程師確認版本。

mandatory_status.target: Voluntary or project-specific unless incorporated by a Chilean regulation, permit condition, grid requirement, contract, lender requirement, insurer requirement, or SEC decision
mandatory_status.cn: GB 44240-2024 is mandatory where its Chinese scope applies; GB/T 36276-2023 is recommended unless made mandatory by procurement, project approval, or another instrument

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] IEC evidence is commonly expected in bankable Chile BESS projects, but mandatory status depends on the exact Chilean instrument or contract. Confirm requested IEC clauses and editions before relying on China GB test reports.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 可融资的智利BESS项目通常会期待IEC证据，但强制性取决于具体智利文件或合同。依赖中国GB测试报告前，应确认所需IEC条款和版本。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 可融資的智利BESS項目通常會期待IEC證據，但強制性取決於具體智利文件或合約。依賴中國GB測試報告前，應確認所需IEC條款和版本。
